en.title: Thousands of sympathetic listeners at the "Ming Tide" concert
en.summary: On July 16, Shanghai issued a high temperature orange warning. The "Ming Tide" offline concert "To the New World" also ushered in the first of three performances in Shanghai. There is nearly an hour before the 7pm kickoff, and the 10,000-person stadium at Shanghai Pudong Development Bank Oriental Sports Center is already almost full. There was a bag of souvenirs and a support stick placed on each chair. Most people had already grabbed it in their hands, and some people were discussing with others about changing to their favorite characters. Just after 6 o'clock, most of the auditorium was already full. I met Ah Yue, a sophomore from Dezhou, Shandong Province, and a player of the "Ming Tide" server. She was a little cautious at first, "This is my first time traveling far away, and it's also my first time watching a concert." Her parents were worried about her, so they accompanied her to Shanghai. She also tried making materials for the first time, and her small bag was bulging with stuff. She was a little embarrassed to give the materials to strangers, "because she was afraid of not doing well", but in the end she gave me several copies.

The hardware configuration in the Chen Ze Cup venue is also the same as those in large-scale e-sports events I have seen. Nine huge screens form the main stage, playing VJ short films specially produced for the players. The trophy stands between the commentary box and the stage, reflecting silvery white light under the spotlight. The offline seats were full of spectators, and online traffic also gathered greater volume. Is the so-called "Souls-like" a gimmick or a well-thought-out one? Fuad is a Slavic uncle with long white hair but full of energy. He speaks English that makes people feel a little headache. He left Wargaming Company ("World of Tanks", etc.) after the outbreak of the Russo-Ukrainian War, and joined forces with Viktor Antonov and others to establish Eschatology Entertainment, a fully remote-working game studio in Cyprus in 2022. This game "Armageddon" is their first self-developed game. Victor Anton mentioned above

ja.title: Pearl Abyss、『Red Desert』のクロスプラットフォームアーカイブ機能を開始、プラットフォーム間で進捗状況を共有
ja.summary: Pearl Abyss は本日、同社のオープンワールド アクション アドベンチャー ゲーム Red Desert がクロスプラットフォーム アーカイブをサポートしたことを発表しました。最新のアップデートにより、プレイヤーは共有セーブを使用して PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S、Steam、Epic Game Store でシームレスに冒険を続けることができます。クロスプラットフォームのアーカイブにより、プレイヤーはさまざまなプラットフォームのアカウントをリンクし、いつでもどこでもゲームの進行を続けることができます。キャラクターの成長とプロットのステータスは、異なるデバイス間でシームレスに同期できます。プレイヤーはゲーム内の [保存] メニューからこの機能を有効にすることができます。 「クロスプラットフォームアーカイブ設定」を選択後、リンクまたはQRコードを使用して専用のクロスプラットフォームアーカイブページに入ります。画面上の指示に従って、プレーヤーはログインして、PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S、Steam、または Epic Games アカウントをリンクできます。

en.title: Pearl Abyss launches cross-platform archive function of "Red Desert", sharing progress across platforms
en.summary: Pearl Abyss announced today that its open-world action-adventure game Red Desert now supports cross-platform archiving. With the latest update, players can use shared saves to seamlessly continue their adventures across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Steam and the Epic Game Store. Cross-platform archiving allows players to link accounts on various platforms and continue game progress anytime and anywhere. Character growth and plot status can be seamlessly synchronized between different devices. Players can enable this feature through the in-game Save menu. After selecting "Cross-platform archive settings", use the link or QR code to enter the exclusive cross-platform archive page. Following the on-screen instructions, players can log in and link their PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Steam or Epic Games accounts.

Our beloved eldest sister, the founder and webmaster of MGCN, Ray (pseudonym Xia Li), left us forever due to illness at 4 o'clock in the morning on July 19, 2026. Ray is one of the earliest promoters of the Chinese gaming community. As early as the beginning of 2000, she actively organized and founded the largest MGS community in China, disseminating gaming information, researching gaming skills, sorting out development insider information, promoting Chinese cultural work, etc. The Ray-team she founded in her early years was one of the earliest game research and promotion teams in China formed voluntarily by players. en.title: EP25 Bias is human nature (Part 1) · Thoughts

en.title: Shortwave Roaming Project｜What songs were the world listening to in the 1990s?
en.summary: The title of today's program is called Shortwave Odyssey. In the era before the Internet, if you had a shortwave radio, you could capture the sound from the other side of the world by turning that little knob. We have done a lot of music recommendations on different themes in our previous programs, but it seems that our vision is always limited to a certain region, so I wonder if we would have a different feeling if we listened to music happening in different regions around the world in the same time dimension. So today, we will take this shortwave radio and turn the knob back to 1990. Starting from European and American music, to Chinese, Japanese and Korean regions, to Latin America and the African continent that we rarely pay attention to, listen to the story of world music throughout the year 🎵Songlist Timeline 01:12 Vision of Love - Mariah Carey (USA 1990) 05:55 U Can

en.summary: Double Battle is what got me hooked on Pokemon. And the way I encounter Pokémon is probably a little different than most of you.

en.title: Bethesda reveals remastered versions of Fallout 3 and Fallout: New Vegas are in development. A “new Fallout” project is also underway in collaboration with Obsidian
en.summary: Bethesda Game Studios announced on July 17 that it is working on remastered versions of Fallout 3 and Fallout: New Vegas. Other future prospects for the company's IP are also revealed.

zh.title: Bethesda 透露《辐射 3》和《辐射：新维加斯》的重制版正在开发中。与 Obsidian 合作的“新辐射”项目也正在进行中
zh.summary: Bethesda Game Studios 于 7 月 17 日宣布，正在开发《辐射 3》和《辐射：新维加斯》的重制版。该公司知识产权的其他未来前景也已公布。

zh.title: 研究表明，工作日程不确定的员工往往不太快乐
zh.summary: 美国宾夕法尼亚州立大学的一个研究小组报告称，工作时间到最后一刻才固定的员工的整体幸福感往往低于工作时间固定的员工。阅读更多...

en.title: Research shows that workers with uncertain work schedules tend to be less happy
en.summary: A research team from Pennsylvania State University in the United States has reported that the overall happiness level of workers whose work schedules are not fixed until the last minute tends to be lower than that of workers whose work schedules are regular. read more...

zh.title: WordPress.com 的“Studio Code”测试版在桌面版上是免费提供的，因此我尝试使用它并对其进行了审查。
zh.summary: “WordPress Studio”是一款免费的桌面应用程序，可让您在本地环境中创建 WordPress 网站并临时发布和共享已完成的页面。这个WordPress Studio已经集成了“WordPress专用的AI编码CLI工具“Studio Code”测试版”，它允许您从桌面应用程序的聊天中创建页面并操作主题和插件，所以我实际上用它来检查功能。阅读更多...

en.title: WordPress.com's "Studio Code" beta version is available for free on the desktop version, so I tried using it and reviewed it.
en.summary: "WordPress Studio" is a free desktop application that allows you to create a WordPress site in a local environment and temporarily publish and share the completed page. This WordPress Studio has been integrated with the ``WordPress-specific AI coding CLI tool ``Studio Code'' beta version'', which allows you to create pages and operate themes and plugins from the chat on the desktop app, so I actually used it to check the functionality. read more...

zh.title: 由于编号检测错误，出现了大量误检被盗车的情况，洛杉矶警察局终止了与系统开发公司的合同，部分车辆在试驾审核时被误认为是被盗车。
zh.summary: 在美国，一家名为 Flock Safety 的公司已经部署了自动车牌读取系统 (ALPR)。最近有消息称，由于误报率较高，洛杉矶警察局已终止与 Flock Safety 的合同。阅读更多...

en.title: A large number of false detections of stolen cars occurred due to a mistake in number detection, and the Los Angeles Police Department terminated the contract with the system development company, and some cars were mistaken for stolen cars during test drive reviews.
en.summary: In the United States, an automatic license plate reading system (ALPR) by a company called Flock Safety has been deployed. It has recently been revealed that the Los Angeles Police Department has terminated its contract with Flock Safety due to a high number of false positives. read more...

zh.title: 我尝试在家里的冰箱里制作美味的冰。
zh.summary: 夏天如火如荼地进行，终于到了开始想念冰的时候了。冰块是外出休闲时随身携带的重要奢侈品，而最重要的是，冰块作为外出防暑的必备品。在家制冰时，常见的是使用制冰盘或者冰箱的制冰功能，但由于自来水有氯味，所以不如市售的冰好吃。因此，我们会尝试用家用冰箱以尽可能低的成本制作美味的冰。阅读更多...

en.title: I tried making delicious ice in my home refrigerator.
en.summary: Summer is in full swing and it's finally time to start missing ice. Ice is an important luxury item to bring with you when you go out for leisure, and above all, ice is indispensable as a preventive measure against heatstroke when you go out. When making ice at home, it is common to use an ice tray or the ice making function of a refrigerator, but it is not as delicious as commercially available ice because of the chlorine smell of tap water. Therefore, we will try to make delicious ice using a household refrigerator at the lowest possible cost. read more...

en.title: Netflix reveals that it has acquired Ben Affleck's AI film production startup ``InterPositive'' for 95 billion yen
en.summary: It has been revealed that the video streaming service Netflix has acquired InterPositive, an AI film production startup co-founded by actor Ben Affleck, for a total of $587 million (approximately 95 billion yen). read more...

zh.title: Netflix 透露以 950 亿日元收购了本·阿弗莱克 (Ben Affleck) 的人工智能电影制作初创公司“InterPositive”
zh.summary: 据透露，视频流服务Netflix以总计5.87亿美元（约950亿日元）的价格收购了由演员本·阿弗莱克（Ben Affleck）共同创立的AI电影制作初创公司InterPositive。阅读更多...

zh.title: WordPress 中的“左撇子用户更容易遇到的错误”将在 7 年后得到修复
zh.summary: 在智能手机上查看 WordPress 网站时，我们发现用左手操作屏幕的用户更有可能遇到仅通过滚动页面就突然打开评论回复字段的问题。此问题于 2019 年报告，但开发人员 Terrence Eden 提出了修复方案，并在大约七年后将其合并到 WordPress 本身中。阅读更多...

en.title: ``Bug that left-handed users are more likely to encounter'' in WordPress to be fixed after 7 years
en.summary: While viewing a WordPress site on a smartphone, it has been found that users who operate the screen with their left hand are more likely to experience an issue where the comment reply field suddenly opens just by scrolling the page. This issue was reported in 2019, but developer Terrence Eden proposed a fix and it was incorporated into WordPress itself about seven years later. read more...

zh.title: 研究表明进行力量训练的人寿命更长
zh.summary: 众所周知，力量训练不仅可以帮助您增强运动肌肉和改善外观，而且对健康也有很大好处。一项对约 15 万人进行长达 30 年追踪的新研究表明，进行力量训练的人寿命更长。阅读更多...

en.title: Research shows people who do strength training live longer
en.summary: Strength training is known to not only help you build muscle for sports and improve your appearance, but also has great health benefits. A new study that followed a total of about 150,000 people for up to 30 years shows that people who strength train live longer. read more...

en.title: Claude Fable 5 now available on select subscription plans
en.summary: Anthropic has announced that Claude Fable 5 will be available as part of their Max and Team Premium plans. read more...

zh.title: 温哥华警察局的网站设有“快速退出按钮”，可以让您在不知道自己已经浏览过该网站的情况下快速离开该网站。
zh.summary: 加拿大温哥华警察局的网站“https://vpd.ca/”有一个名为“QUICK ESCAPE”的按钮，可以让您快速离开该网站，这样就很难发现您之前一直在浏览该网站。如果有人处于危险之中并想要向警方寻求帮助，隐藏他们正在做的事情比关闭浏览器或选项卡更容易。阅读更多...

en.title: The Vancouver Police Department's website is equipped with a ``quick escape button'' that allows you to quickly leave the website without knowing that you have been viewing it.
en.summary: Canada's Vancouver Police Department's website ``https://vpd.ca/'' has a button called ``QUICK ESCAPE'' that allows you to quickly leave the site so that it is difficult to find out that you were looking at the site until just before. If someone is in danger and wants to seek help from the police, it's easier to hide what they're doing than closing a browser or tab. read more...

en.title: ``Zipline'' allows you to instantly upload and share files from your browser, ShareX, iOS shortcuts, etc. for free, open source and self-hosted
en.summary: Generally, to share a file, the steps are to access the shared server, upload the file, and then copy the sharing URL, but when sharing a large number of files that are created in a short period of time, you will have to repeat the same process over and over again, which is time-consuming. If you use ``Zipline'', which allows you to immediately use the generated shared URL, you can send files directly from ShareX or iOS shortcuts, greatly reducing the hassle, so I actually tried it. read more...

zh.title: “Zipline”允许您免费、开源和自托管地从浏览器、ShareX、iOS 快捷方式等即时上传和共享文件
zh.summary: 一般来说，共享文件的步骤是访问共享服务器，上传文件，然后复制共享URL，但是当共享短时间内创建的大量文件时，您将不得不一遍又一遍地重复相同的过程，这非常耗时。如果你使用``Zipline''，它可以让你立即使用生成的共享URL，你可以直接从ShareX或iOS快捷方式发送文件，大大减少了麻烦，所以我实际尝试了一下。阅读更多...
